user.title: Actionable Reminders
user.description: Setting up the Actionable Reminders hub with sensible defaults. Add individual reminders afterwards with the "Add reminder" button.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Actionable Reminders is already set up. Add reminders to the existing hub instead.
abort.missing_date: This schedule type requires a date.

basics.title: Reminder basics
basics.description: What is this reminder, how often should it repeat, and what should it say?

data_description.reminder_name: A short name, e.g. "Give dogs meds" or "Change A/C filter".
data_description.schedule_type: Daily, weekly, monthly, yearly, one-time, or driven by a condition (template).
data_description.message: What you'll be asked, e.g. "Did you give the dogs their meds?"

data.due_template: Due when this template is true

data_description.schedule_time: Nothing fires before this time (and never during quiet hours).
data_description.due_template: Jinja template. `days_since_done` and `last_done` are available — e.g. `{{ days_since_done >= 7 }}`.
data_description.anniversary_date: The anniversary/birthday. Include the year to announce an age.
data_description.once_date: The day this one-time reminder is due.
data_description.schedule_monthly_type: A specific day of the month, or a week pattern like "first Wednesday".
data_description.schedule_monthly_day: 1-31. Months that are shorter fire on their last day.

monthly.title: Monthly pattern
monthly.description: Which weekday, and which week of the month?

data_description.nag: On: keep prompting and escalating until you acknowledge. Off: a single announcement.
data_description.allow_critical: Off by default. Only turn on if this reminder should be able to override Do Not Disturb when it escalates.
data_description.lead_times_text: Comma-separated days, e.g. "30, 7, 1". Leave empty for none.
data_description.optional: Optional reminders can be skipped without consequence.
data_description.until_done: Carry over to following days until it's marked done.

menu.title: Save or customise
menu.description: Everything else falls back to the hub defaults. You can change all of it later.

data.max_escalations: Escalations before giving up for the day

data_description.alexa_devices: Which Echo announces this. The first device is used for the voice acknowledgement.
data_description.actionable: Offer Done / Not-yet buttons (and voice acknowledgement).
data_description.retry_interval: Minutes between retries. Empty = hub default.
data_description.max_retries: Retries before switching to escalation. Empty = hub default.
data_description.escalation_interval: Minutes between escalated retries. Empty = hub default.
data_description.max_escalations: Escalations before auto-skipping for the day. Empty = hub default.
data_description.presence_sensors: Only prompt when at least one of these is home. If they're all unavailable the reminder still fires.
data_description.catchup_on_arrival: Prompt as soon as someone gets home if it's overdue.
data_description.quiet_start: Nothing fires after this time. Empty = hub default.
data_description.quiet_end: Nothing fires before this time. Empty = hub default.
data_description.on_complete: Actions to run when this reminder is marked done — e.g. press a button to reset a counter. No helper automation needed.

abort.already_configured: A reminder with that name already exists.

init.title: Hub defaults
init.description: Defaults inherited by every reminder that doesn't override them, plus the calendar to watch.

data.default_max_escalations: Escalations before giving up for the day

data_description.default_retry_interval: Minutes between retries before escalation kicks in.
data_description.default_max_retries: How many retries before a reminder escalates.
data_description.default_max_escalations: How many escalations before a reminder gives up for the day.
data_description.earliest_retry_time: Reminders don't resume before this time.
data_description.default_mobile_service: Leave empty to let the notification script pick.
data_description.default_alexa_devices: Default Echo(s) for announcements and voice acknowledgement.
data_description.reminders_calendar: Every event on this calendar becomes a reminder — a heads-up the day before and an actionable nag on the day. Leave empty to disable.
data_description.default_actionable: Offer Done / Not-yet buttons by default.
data_description.default_presence_sensors: Only prompt when at least one of these is home.
